decks.notes: This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while maintaining aggressive pressure with efficient creatures and disruptive spells. By combining hand disruption like Thoughtseize with countermagic like Force of Will and Daze, the deck aims to control the game and protect its threats. With strong card selection tools like Brainstorm and Ponder, the deck can find the right answers at the right time. The inclusion of powerful creatures like Murktide Regent and Nethergoyf, along with proactive threats like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, allows the deck to close out games quickly while keeping the opponent off balance.

The key concept of this deck is to control the tempo of the game by utilizing efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Snuff Out, while disrupting the opponent's game plan with disruptive cards such as Thoughtseize and Force of Will. The deck aims to maintain board presence with creatures like Murktide Regent and Nethergoyf, while also providing card advantage and selection through cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Brainstorm. By leveraging the deck's dual colors, Dimir (Black and Blue), the player can quickly apply pressure on their opponent and maintain control of the game.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo by utilizing artifacts and spells to generate card advantage and mana acceleration. It aims to quickly dig through the deck with cards like Riddlesmith and Echo of Eons, while also disrupting opponents with Defense Grid. Lion's Eye Diamond plays a crucial role in enabling explosive turns, alongside cards like Chrome Mox and Lotus Petal. The inclusion of Urza's Saga and Mishra's Bauble provides additional synergy and value. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful and unexpected combo finish.

The deck focuses on maintaining control of the board using aggressive tactics and tempo plays. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy with cards like Daze and Force of Will while utilizing cards like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent to apply pressure and close out the game quickly. The deck also includes card draw and filtering spells like Brainstorm and Ponder to ensure consistency and help find key pieces. Overall, the deck's strategy involves outpacing the opponent while controlling the tempo of the game.

This deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient creatures. Utilizing cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the board, combined with powerful threats like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Barrowgoyf to close out the game quickly. With a mix of disruption, card advantage, and threats, this tempo deck looks to outmaneuver the opponent and dictate the pace of the game. Wasteland is utilized to disrupt the opponent's mana base while also providing the deck with additional tempo advantage.

The main concept of this Mardu Aggro deck is to aggressively control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy while quickly building up a strong battlefield presence. Utilizing a mix of powerful creatures, removal spells, and disruptive cards like Cabal Therapy and Thoughtseize, the deck aims to pressure the opponent and maintain control of the game. By efficiently utilizing cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Goblin Bombardment, the deck can swiftly close out games while keeping the opponent on the back foot. The deck's flexibility and ability to adapt to different situations make it a formidable force in the Legacy format.

This deck focuses on aggressive plays with a combination of efficient, low-cost spells and disruptive counterspells. It aims to quickly control the game tempo, utilizing cards like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent to apply pressure on the opponent. Wasteland and Boomerang Basics are included for land disruption, while Mishra's Bauble and Ponder help with card selection and hand manipulation. The deck also features powerful removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Unholy Heat. Overall, the strategy revolves around maintaining board presence while controlling the opponent's resources.

The deck focuses on utilizing low-cost efficient spells and creatures to control the tempo of the game and apply pressure to the opponent. By combining powerful early threats like Delver of Secrets and Dragon's Rage Channeler with disruptive spells like Daze and Force of Will, the deck aims to quickly establish board presence and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Utilizing lands like Wasteland for resource denial and card advantage from Mishra's Bauble, the deck aims to maintain control and finish the game quickly with burn spells like Lightning Bolt.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and efficiently reanimate powerful creatures like Griselbrand, Archon of Cruelty, and Ashen Rider using spells such as Reanimate, Animate Dead, and Shallow Grave. The deck also includes disruption cards like Cabal Therapy, Thoughtseize, and Unmask to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal allow for explosive starts, while cards like Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers and Atraxa, Grand Unifier provide additional utility and protection. The deck aims to combo off and overwhelm the opponent with its powerful reanimated threats.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and efficiently reanimate powerful creatures from the graveyard, such as Archon of Cruelty, Atraxa, Grand Unifier, and Griselbrand, using spells like Reanimate, Shallow Grave, and Animate Dead. The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's hand with cards like Unmask and Thoughtseize, while also utilizing ramp and mana acceleration through Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual. By combining a strong reanimation strategy with disruptive elements, the deck aims to overwhelm and outpace the opponent in a Legacy 1 vs 1 format.

The main concept of this UWx Control deck is to utilize various counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage engines to control the board and outvalue the opponent. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan, protect its own key threats like Murktide Regent and Tamiyo, and maintain card advantage through cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Brainstorm. By efficiently managing resources and making strategic decisions, the deck seeks to outlast the opponent and ultimately win the game through attrition and superior card quality.

The deck focuses on a fast and aggressive strategy by deploying creatures like Amped Raptor and Guide of Souls early on to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes cards like Ocelot Pride and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to boost its creatures' power and toughness, while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy. The deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Wasteland, while also having access to disruption with cards like Goblin Bombardment and Karakas. The aggressive nature of the deck is supported by its land base, ensuring consistent mana development.

The main concept of this Legacy Combo - Hogaak deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with cards using cards like Stitcher's Supplier and Once Upon a Time, and then use cards like Wight of the Reliquary and Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures. The deck also aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy with cards like Thoughtseize and Wasteland, while also protecting its own creatures with cards like Sylvan Safekeeper. Overall, the deck focuses on utilizing graveyard synergies and efficient creature plays to secure victory.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Amped Raptor and Ocelot Pride, while controlling the board with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Static Prison. The deck also includes disruption and removal spells like Wasteland and Goblin Bombardment to keep the opponent on the back foot. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional support and finishing power. The deck aims to establish early dominance through strong creatures and disruptive spells to outpace the opponent and secure victory.

This deck focuses on using disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Daze to control the game while quickly deploying aggressive threats like Murktide Regent and Brazen Borrower. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student helps to filter through the deck for key cards, while cards like Fatal Push and Snuff Out provide removal for opposing threats. The deck also utilizes powerful lands like Wasteland and Underground Sea to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The overall goal is to maintain tempo by disrupting the opponent's game plan while deploying threats to close out the game quickly.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's resources and locking down the board with a combination of discard spells, removal, land destruction, and a control game plan. It aims to establish an advantage by utilizing cards like Smallpox, Thoughtseize, and Malevolent Rumble to disrupt the opponent's strategy while deploying threats like Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis and Barrowgoyf to close out the game. The inclusion of cards like Urza's Saga and Life from the Loam provides additional utility and card advantage, while Wasteland and Ghost Quarter disrupt the opponent's mana base. The deck aims to control the game and grind out a victory in the long game.
